name: Psychic-Edge Halberd
effect: Molecular-level melee edge guided by precognition — ignores 50% of target armor.

name: Mind-Shatter Projector
effect: Targeted psychic burst turns enemy against nearest ally for 4 seconds. No direct damage.

name: Void Scythe
effect: Dimensional edge — 15% instant-kill chance on light infantry targets. Unlocked via Branch 1 T3.

name: Phase-Shift Weave
effect: +12% Phase Blink probability. Stacks with faction mechanic base value.

name: Soul-Stone Ward
effect: 20% chance on death: consciousness captured. Unit respawns at 50% HP after 8 seconds.

name: Phase Jump Pack
effect: Active teleport — 30m range, 1 charge per battle. No cooldown once activated.

name: Warp-Laced Rounds
effect: 10% chance per hit to dimensionally displace target to random nearby location.

name: Hybrid Crystal/Kinetic Slugs
effect: Physical crystal flechettes guided by psychic aim. +15% damage vs BOTH Vorax AND Core Guardians. Limited production.

name: Chronal Accelerator
effect: Unit operates 20% faster across all action timings (attack, move, Phase Blink recharge).
